{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323031522E5D4CD618EC39DC3E4F2"}"},"total":1551},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7501866212381623064","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，也很有意思，得到了火之意志的认可，但是，要说但是哈，兄弟们吃饭的时候别看，我一边听一边看一边吃饭，开始还好好的，突然吃着吃着就有味道了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746670392,"group_id":"7214705341118811168","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"甜甜花甜不过芭芭拉，芭芭拉闪耀登场","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7vvIq3u2TJreI6X0jkFxMw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b08ca0b552fd43d089415daeafb8305d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796491&x-signature=%2Btou97rSoYw14tI3bfthp8CLlDc%3D","user_id":"105770271970","user_name":"NB大帝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105770271970","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7214705341118811168","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+无女主+搞笑+不死+缺德】
又名：《开局俩系统，当场干掉一个！》《我在修真界坑蒙拐骗》《缺德系统逼着我搞事》《缺德之王》
疯之巅，是发癫，有我谭风便能癫！
魂穿修真界，获得两系统。
不但能复活，搞事与跑路更能获得奖励。
谭风决定将缺德贯彻到底。
仇人祭祖，他一头撞死在墓碑之上，高呼：“以后你们祭祖我也有一份！”
别人进洞探宝，他往里灌辣椒烟，往灵池里放辣椒。
他更是将仇人的老祖宗挖出来，放拍卖会进行拍卖。
精通各种栽赃嫁祸。
他开设搞事公司。
打斗、生儿育女都需要办证交税，不然就抓起来送上拍卖会。
他的名声响彻修真界，远扬异界。
……
放下个人素质，享受缺德人生。
与其自我约束，不如发疯咬人。
（微慢热）
（部分场景重口味，慎入哦！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/86969e9385f703a14ba6e610848032b4","author":"词中意","author_id":"","book_id":"7214705341118811168","book_name":"我在修真界坑蒙拐骗","book_short_name":"缺德之王","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7214705453228540451","read_count":"25968","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2348396"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"1116","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,腹黑,无女主,东方玄幻,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/13d548b52fb63df16ff8a74bdb8e90d8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390922&x-signature=aPjYXyCYo%2B%2BfU1Un307larX084o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104847631265","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"328"},"
